name: Memory (Tiered)
description: Real tiered memory: working (Redis), semantic (Qdrant), and procedural (Neo4j + Temporal) stores, exposed via agent tools.

working.redisUrl.label: Working Redis URL
working.redisUrl.help: Redis connection string for short-lived working memory (run state, keys with TTL).

working.keyPrefix.label: Working Key Prefix
working.keyPrefix.help: Namespace prefix for all working-memory keys.

working.defaultTtlSeconds.label: Working Default TTL (s)
working.defaultTtlSeconds.help: Default time-to-live for working-memory entries when not specified.

semantic.qdrantUrl.label: Semantic Qdrant URL
semantic.qdrantUrl.help: Qdrant connection string for embedded long-term facts and concepts.

semantic.collection.label: Semantic Collection
semantic.collection.help: Qdrant collection name for semantic chunks.

semantic.embeddingProvider.label: Embedding Provider
semantic.embeddingProvider.help: Embedding provider adapter (openai, gemini, voyage, ollama, ...).

semantic.embeddingModel.label: Embedding Model
semantic.embeddingModel.help: Embedding model used to vectorize semantic chunks.

procedural.neo4jUrl.label: Procedural Neo4j URL
procedural.neo4jUrl.help: Neo4j connection string for stored reusable procedures.

procedural.temporalHost.label: Temporal Host
procedural.temporalHost.help: Temporal server host for procedure workflow execution.
